timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.

description: Large irrigated farming systems in Mesopotamia make hoeing, hand weeding, and field maintenance regular agricultural labor.

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.

description: Ancient agrarian traditions increasingly classify useful plants against unwanted growth, shaping later ideas of the weed.

description: Roman agricultural writers such as Columella and Pliny discuss cultivation methods that suppress weeds in arable fields.

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.
title: Meadows become ornamental forecourts
description: Castle and monastic precincts use short grassed spaces for processions and display, linking open turf with status.

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.
title: Renaissance gardens regularize lawn spaces
description: Formal European garden design begins to integrate clipped grass as a deliberate visual surface rather than rough pasture.

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.
title: English estates popularize the lawn
description: Country-house landscapes in Britain turn short turf into a marker of order, wealth, and controlled nature.

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.
title: Seed drill improves row cultivation
description: Jethro Tull's seed drill encourages more systematic cultivation between rows and strengthens mechanical approaches to weed control.

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.
title: Ha-ha expands the uninterrupted lawn
description: Landscape designers use the ha-ha to hide boundaries and extend the visual sweep of lawns around country houses.

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.

description: Edwin Budding receives the patent generally credited with creating the modern lawn mower for close-cut turf.

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.
title: Central Park normalizes public lawn scenery
description: Urban park design in New York helps make the lawn a mass civic ideal rather than only an aristocratic one.

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.
title: Suburban lawn culture spreads
description: Middle-class suburbs in Britain and North America adopt front lawns as signs of domestic respectability and hygiene.

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.
title: Postwar suburbia makes lawns a default

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.

timeline_description: From crop-side weeds in the first fields to suburban turf and rewilded yards, this timeline traces changing ideas of unwanted plants and controlled grass.
title: Rewilding challenges the manicured lawn
description: Ecological landscaping, meadow planting, and pollinator-friendly yards reframe weeds as habitat rather than simple nuisance.
